reasoning_content:
The user wants me to extract the layout of the provided document image into a JSON format containing bounding boxes (bboxes).

1.  **Analyze the image:**
    *   **Header:** Contains the ST logo, "life.augmented", and the main title "STM32F411xC STM32F411xE".
    *   **Subtitle:** "Arm Cortex-M4 32b MCU+FPU, 125 DMIPS, 512KB Flash, 128KB RAM, USB OTG FS, 11 TIMs, 1 ADC, 13 comm. interfaces".
    *   **Document Type:** "Datasheet - production data".
    *   **Main Content:** Divided into two columns.
        *   **Left Column:** "Features" section with bullet points covering various technical specifications (technology, power supply, core, memories, clock, power consumption, ADC, DMA, timers).
        *   **Right Column:** Continues the features list (timers, debug mode, I/O ports, communication interfaces, CRC, ID, RTC, packages). It also includes a diagram of package types and a summary table.
    *   **Footer:** Date "January 2024", document ID "DS10314 Rev 8", page number "1/151", and a disclaimer.

2.  **Define Bounding Boxes:** I need to estimate coordinates for each text block or logical section. The image size is roughly 1000x1400 pixels (based on typical aspect ratios, let's assume a standard coordinate system). I will use relative coordinates or pixel values if I can estimate them. Since I can't measure pixels directly, I will use a normalized 1000x1000 grid or similar, but the prompt implies standard pixel coordinates. Let's look at the image provided in the prompt to gauge scale. It's a standard A4-like page.

    *   **Header Area:**
        *   Logo: Top left.
        *   Title: Top right/center.
        *   Subtitle: Below title.
        *   "Datasheet...": Below subtitle, right aligned.

    *   **Features Section (Left):**
        *   "Features" heading.
        *   Bullet points list.

    *   **Features Section (Right):**
        *   Package images and labels.
        *   Continuation of bullet points.
        *   Table 1.

    *   **Footer:**
        *   Bottom line text.

3.  **Drafting the JSON structure:**
    *   I will iterate through the visual elements.
    *   **Element 1:** Logo area.
    *   **Element 2:** Main Title "STM32F411xC STM32F411xE".
    *   **Element 3:** Subtitle text.
    *   **Element 4:** "Datasheet - production data".
    *   **Element 5:** "Features" header.
    *   **Element 6:** First bullet point "Includes ST state-of-the-art...".
    *   **Element 7:** Second bullet point "Dynamic efficiency line...".
    *   **Element 8:** Sub-bullets for power supply and temp range.
    *   **Element 9:** Third bullet point "Core: Arm...".
    *   **Element 10:** "Memories" bullet.
    *   **Element 11:** Sub-bullets for flash and SRAM.
    *   **Element 12:** "Clock, reset..." bullet.
    *   **Element 13:** Sub-bullets for clock details.
    *   **Element 14:** "Power consumption" bullet.
    *   **Element 15:** Sub-bullets for power modes.
    *   **Element 16:** "1x12-bit..." bullet.
    *   **Element 17:** "General-purpose DMA..." bullet.
    *   **Element 18:** "Up to 11 timers..." bullet.
    *   **Element 19:** Package images area (top right of content).
    *   **Element 20:** "timers (independent...)" text (continuation from left col).
    *   **Element 21:** "Debug mode" bullet.
    *   **Element 22:** Sub-bullets for debug.
    *   **Element 23:** "Up to 81 I/O ports..." bullet.
    *   **Element 24:** Sub-bullets for I/O.
    *   **Element 25:** "Up to 13 communication interfaces" bullet.
    *   **Element 26:** Sub-bullets for interfaces.
    *   **Element 27:** "CRC calculation unit" bullet.
    *   **Element 28:** "96-bit unique ID" bullet.
    *   **Element 29:** "RTC..." bullet.
    *   **Element 30:** "All packages..." bullet.
    *   **Element 31:** "Table 1. Device summary" header.
    *   **Element 32:** Table content (Reference, Part number, etc.).
    *   **Element 33:** Footer text.

4.  **Refining Coordinates (Mental Estimation):**
    *   Page width ~1000, height ~1400.
    *   Header: y=100-200.
    *   Features start: y=230.
    *   Left column ends around y=850.
    *   Right column starts around y=230 (images) and text continues.
    *   Table: y=750-850.
    *   Footer: y=1350.

    *Let's be more precise based on the visual layout.*
    *   Logo: [100, 100, 150, 150] (approx)
    *   Title: [430, 90, 880, 120]
    *   Subtitle: [130, 140, 880, 190]
    *   "Datasheet...": [680, 190, 880, 210]
    *   "Features": [110, 220, 210, 240]
    *   Left Column Text blocks...
    *   Right Column Images: [520, 220, 880, 330]
    *   Right Column Text blocks...
    *   Table: [520, 740, 880, 840]
    *   Footer: [110, 880, 880, 910]

    *Self-Correction on coordinates:* I need to output specific numbers. I will estimate based on a 1000x1000 normalized scale or just raw pixel estimation if I treat the image as a grid. Let's assume the image is roughly 1000px wide.
    *   Top margin: ~10%
    *   Header height: ~15%
    *   Content height: ~70%
    *   Footer height: ~5%
